#1 BENSON/NAJERA: C/C FOR CT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT W/ ATTY J BAUTISTA. DEFTS E WHITE & B WILLIAMS PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED. TERMS NOT ON RECORD. ALL PARTIES UNDERSTAND & AGREE TO TERMS. JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST BOTH DEFTS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITE, ELLIOT WILLIAMS, BABY GINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1022 TARAVAL #A, STAYED UNTIL JUN-07-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59 PM. DEFTS TO TRANSFER UTILITY BILLS TO NEW RESIDENT; PLTF NOT LIABLE FOR THEM.
